{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Rosegold Emperor
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rosegold Emperor]] may not wait on the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rosegold Emperor]] has provided assistance.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Yes! I mean, we would be most grateful, and we will not forget the Rosegold Emperor’s assistance.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
